name: Factory Expansion Phase #1
description: Expanded the main production floor by 5,000 sq ft, including structural reinforcement and electrical layout.

name: HVAC System Overhaul
description: Complete replacement of outdated HVAC units with high-efficiency smart systems across a 3-story office building.

name: Robotic Assembly Line Installation
description: Fitted and calibrated a completely automated robotic welding line for automotive part assembly.

name: Warehouse Structural Audit
description: Detailed structural audit and safety compliance check for a mega-warehouse facility.

name: Conveyor Belt Modernization
description: Upgraded main conveyor belts with anti-slip food-grade materials and reinforced motors.

name: Hydraulic Press Assembly
description: Assembled and successfully tested a 500-ton hydraulic forging press.

name: Facility Roofing Overhaul
description: Replaced aging warehouse sheet metal roof with insulated commercial roofing.

name: Safety Compliance Upgrade
description: Redesigned plant layout and added guardrails to ensure OSHA compliance.

name: Solar Panel Array Installation
description: Installed a 2MW solar array on the client's main manufacturing facility roof.

name: Backup Generator Fitting
description: Fitted industrial diesel backup generators to ensure zero downtime during blackouts.

name: Pipeline Insulation Replacement
description: Stripped and replaced thermal insulation on 2 miles of chemical transport pipelines.

name: Office Complex Buildout
description: Completed interior buildout for a 10,000 sq ft modern open-plan office space.

name: Boiler System Diagnostics
description: Performed thermal imaging and efficiency diagnostics on industrial boilers.

name: Heavy Machinery Lubrication Plan
description: Implemented automated scheduled lubrication systems for earthmoving equipment.

name: Pneumatic Control Refit
description: Upgraded pneumatic air lines and controllers to increase packaging lines speed by 15%.
